_comment: AI Toolbox Configuration for OpenCode CLI — copy to <repo>/opencode.json

boot.template: Run the AI Toolbox boot sequence: check environment (.agent/), read memory files (memory-index.md, architecture-decisions.md, session-handover.md), sync task state, and report toolbox status (rtk, Beads, MCP).
boot.description: Boot AI Toolbox and recover session context

sync.template: Run .agent/scripts/sync-task.sh (or .ps1 on Windows) to sync task state from Beads/task tracker to .agent/memory/current-task.md. Report the current task state.

handover.template: Consolidate session memory: update .agent/memory/session-handover.md with completed work, changed files, test results, current task status, next recommended step, and any blockers. Run .agent/scripts/hook-stop.sh (or .ps1) if available.
handover.description: Create session handover for next session

templates.template: Browse and install specialist agents from the Template Bridge project (413+ templates in 26 categories). Use `npx claude-code-templates@latest` to browse interactively or `npx claude-code-templates@latest --agent {category}/{name} --yes` to install directly. Categories: ai-specialists, api-graphql, api-rest, blockchain-web3, database, devops-infrastructure, mobile, programming-languages, security, ui-analysis, and 16 more.

ai-toolbox-reviewer.description: Code review specialist. Use PROACTIVELY when completing tasks, implementing features, or before merging.

ai-toolbox-tester.description: TDD & Testing specialist. Use PROACTIVELY when running tests, verifying changes, or before claiming any work complete.

ai-toolbox-security.description: Security auditor. Use PROACTIVELY when code touches auth, secrets, permissions, or external APIs.
